name: localbridge-mcp
description: MCP adapter layer for LocalBridge, exposing X/Twitter capabilities via MCP tools.

scripts.test:e2e:list-x-instances: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-list-x-instances.e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:list-x-instances:unavailable: npm run build && npm run typecheck:tests && tsx tests/mcp-list-x-instances-unavailable.e2e.ts
